arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs CF Monterrey: Club World Cup preview, team news & predicted lineups
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund, who won Group F at the 2025 FIFA Club World Cup, face Monterrey, second-place finishers in Group E, in the round of 16.

arts.ttl: How to watch Borussia Dortmund vs Monterrey FOR FREE: TV Channel and live stream for Club World Cup
arts.sum: Winners will face either Real Madrid or Juventus in the Club World Cup quarter-final
